authors: Clara Juarez Miro Sandra Banjac Folker Hanusch a Department of Political Science
Spainb Centre for Media and Journalism Studies
raw_title: Audience Expectations of Journalists: Demands, Beliefs and Assessments
title_en: Audience Expectations of Journalists: Demands, Beliefs and Assessments
title_zh: 受众对记者的期望：需求、信念与评估
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了公众对记者有什么样的期望，包括他们希望记者做什么、相信记者应该具备哪些品质，以及如何评价记者的表现。
plain_summary_en: This study examines what the public expects from journalists, including what they want journalists to do, what qualities they believe journalists should have, and how they evaluate journalists' performance.
research_direction_zh: 新闻可信度与受众关系研究，关注公众对新闻职业的认知和期望如何影响媒体信任和新闻消费行为。
research_direction_en: Research on journalism credibility and audience relationships, focusing on how public perceptions and expectations of the journalistic profession affect media trust and news consumption behaviors.
